{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet es ne gribbeju Bile- 
amm klaufht/ un wiꞥsch fiveh- 
ttja juhs fwehtidams/ un es is- 
glahbn juhs no winna Rohfas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un juhs zehlatees pahr to 
Jardann/ un nahzat us Jeriku/ 
tad karroja Jerikus Eedsihwotaji 
prett jums/ tee Amoritert/ tee 
Weresitext/ un tee Kananitexi/ un 
tee Eetitexi/ un tee Girgositexi/ un 
tee Gewitexi/ un tee Jebusitexi/ bet 
es nodewu tohs juhsâs Rohkâs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es fuhttiju juhsu Preek- 
schâ Dundukus/ tee isdsinne tohs 
preeffch jums/ ka arri tohs diwi 
Rehninus to Amoriteru/ ne zaun 
tawu Sohbinu nedâ zaun tawu 
Stohpu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es dewu jums to Sem- 
mi/ ko tu ne effi apkohpis/ un 
Pilssachtus/ ko juhs ne eﬅat us- 
zehluschi/ un juhs dshwojat eeksch 
teem/ Wihna-Dahrsus un Etjes- 
Kohkus/ ko juhs ne effat dehsti- 
jutchi/ ka juhs no teem ehdat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu bihsteetees to KUN- 
Gu/ un kalpojeet winnam stai- 
dri un tai-tni/ un atmetteet tohs 
Deewus/kam juhsu Tehwi winn- 
pufs Uppes un Egiptes-Semnê 
irr kalpojschi/ un kalpojeet tain 
KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tonehr ja tas jums ne 
patiks tain KUNGAM kalpoht/ 
tad iswehlejeet peezsch jums 
chodoen/ kuzaun juhs gribbat 
kalpoht/ arrig teem Deeweem/ 
kam juhsu Tehwi irr kalpojschi/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbisdeja tee Laudie 
un fazztija: Laid tas tahfu n 
muns irr/ ka mehs buhtum t 
KUNGU atstahjuscht/ zitteet 
Deetweein kalpodami.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGSS i 
muhsfu Deews/ tas irr muhs 
muhs Tehwus no Eqiptes 
Semmes/ no ta Wahrgu-Nan 
ma isweddis/ kas preefsch muis 
schahs leelas Sihmes darrijs/ u 
muhs pasargajs us wisfeem Je- 
teem/ kur mehs effim gabijusch 
un starp wisfeem Laudim/ za 
kuru Widdu mehs effam ga 
jschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGSS irr muh 
fu Preekfschâ isdsinnis wisfu 
tohs Laudis/ un tohs Amorite- 
rus/ schahs Semmes Eedsihwo 
tajus/ tapehz kalpofim mehs tan 
KUNGAM/ jo tas irr muh 
fu Deews.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazztija Josuus u 
teem Laudim: Juhs ne warrefee 
tam KUNGAM/ (un zitteet 
Deeweem) kalpoht/ jo ta 
KUNGSS irr weens fweht 
Deews/ wiꞥsch irr ween 
STIPRAJS DEEWS 
weens Dusinotajs/ wiꞥsch n 
peedohs juhsa Pahrkahpscha 
nas/ nedâ juhsus Grehkus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad juhs no ta KUNG 
atstahfeet/ un fwetcheem Dee 
ween
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
